testcase.name: listGroups_Success_EmptyList
testcase.system-out:
Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1968588425 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM link_group WHERE username = ? ==> Parameters: grouptest(String) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,gid,name,username,sort_order,del_flag,create_time,update_time FROM link_group WHERE del_flag=0 AND (username = ? AND del_flag = ?) ORDER BY sort_order ASC,create_time DESC ==> Parameters: grouptest(String), 0(Integer) <== Total: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9]
MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /api/group/list Parameters = {} Headers = [Authorization:"Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzaG9ydGxpbmsiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNzQ3OTcsImV4cCI6MTc3NzI2MTE5NywidXNlcklkIjoyMDQ4MjQ1NjczMzM4MTk1OTY5LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6Imdyb3VwdGVzdCJ9.NiArPgEcPys4vzxaWKtXLHCMFTG8hfpxlVxRYah85W0"] Body = null Session Attrs = {}

Async: Async started = false Async result = null
Resolved Exception: Type = null
ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null

MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 200 Error message = null Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", Content-Type:"application/json"] Content type = application/json Body = {"code":200,"msg":"success","data":[],"success":true} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = [] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@1c04dae9]

testcase.name: listGroups_Success
testcase.system-out:
Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1191848005 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM link_group WHERE username = ? ==> Parameters: grouptest(String) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO link_group ( id, gid, name, username, sort_order, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 2048245678849511426(Long), 74799059(String), 分组1(String), grouptest(String), 0(Integer), 0(Integer), 2026-04-26T11:39:59.059845800(LocalDateTime), 2026-04-26T11:39:59.059845800(LocalDateTime) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO link_group ( id, gid, name, username, sort_order, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 2048245678849511427(Long), 74799063(String), 分组2(String), grouptest(String), 0(Integer), 0(Integer), 2026-04-26T11:39:59.063868100(LocalDateTime), 2026-04-26T11:39:59.063868100(LocalDateTime) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,gid,name,username,sort_order,del_flag,create_time,update_time FROM link_group WHERE del_flag=0 AND (username = ? AND del_flag = ?) ORDER BY sort_order ASC,create_time DESC ==> Parameters: grouptest(String), 0(Integer) <== Columns: ID, GID, NAME, USERNAME, SORT_ORDER, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME <== Row: 2048245678849511427, 74799063, 分组2, grouptest, 0, 0, 2026-04-26 11:39:59.063868, 2026-04-26 11:39:59.063868 <== Row: 2048245678849511426, 74799059, 分组1, grouptest, 0, 0, 2026-04-26 11:39:59.059846, 2026-04-26 11:39:59.059846 <== Total: 2 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2fd16368]
MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /api/group/list Parameters = {} Headers = [Authorization:"Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzaG9ydGxpbmsiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNzQ3OTcsImV4cCI6MTc3NzI2MTE5NywidXNlcklkIjoyMDQ4MjQ1NjczMzM4MTk1OTY5LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6Imdyb3VwdGVzdCJ9.NiArPgEcPys4vzxaWKtXLHCMFTG8hfpxlVxRYah85W0"] Body = null Session Attrs = {}

testcase.name: listGroups_Fail_NotLogin
testcase.system-out:
Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@7ba0c0e5] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1625832633 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM link_group WHERE username = ? ==> Parameters: grouptest(String) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@7ba0c0e5] 2026-04-26T11:39:59.125+08:00 WARN 24412 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] c.s.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Token异常 - URI: /api/group/list, Method: GET, Code: 1008, Message: 用户未登录
MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /api/group/list Parameters = {} Headers = [] Body = null Session Attrs = {}
Handler: Type = com.shortlink.controller.GroupController Method = com.shortlink.controller.GroupController#listGroups()
Async: Async started = false Async result = null
Resolved Exception: Type = com.shortlink.common.exception.TokenException
ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null
FlashMap: Attributes = null
MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 401 Error message = null Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", "Access-Control-Request-Headers", Content-Type:"application/json"] Content type = application/json Body = {"code":1008,"msg":"用户未登录","data":null,"success":false} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = [] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@7ba0c0e5] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@7ba0c0e5]
